[[File:Wolf mount talent.gif|thumb|385x385px|Lilith the Wolf]]
<blockquote>Allows you to ride your Dog anywhere at speed. 

Every level allows your Dog to '''jump higher.''' 

To ride your Dog, have an '''Empty Hand''' then '''Rapidly Right-click''' the Dog at least '''Twice''' to get on.</blockquote>

== Trivia ==

* It was added in the original DT.
* Back then before DTN 1.17.0, you have to be in the air and right click the dog to mount.
*
* Give your good boy an [[Energizer Stick]] and zoom with Mach K9! Useful to get away when you're stuck in a sticky situation.
* Combine with [[Flying Furball]] talent for the best transportation you can get in a game!
* Couple with [[Hell Hound]] talent to make traveling in Lava lakes a breeze! Note that you need to increase the dog's size with the [[Magnifying Bone]] for your hitbox not to touch lava.
